exam_price_notes: ~₩35,000 in Korea (~$26 USD); varies abroad (~$35–55 USD depending on country); fee covers both Level 1 and Level 2 certification eligibility

testing_centers.provider: NIIED TOPIK Official Test Centres (Korea and worldwide)

id_requirements: Valid government-issued photo ID required. In Korea: Resident registration card, passport, or alien registration card. Overseas: Passport or equivalent national ID card.
exam_rules: No electronic devices (including mobile phones) allowed in exam rooms. TOPIK I: Listening + Reading only (multiple-choice OMR). TOPIK II: Listening + Reading (multiple-choice) + Writing (short-answer and essay tasks). Candidates must arrive at least 20 minutes before exam start. Late entry is not permitted after the exam begins.

prerequisites.description: None; designed for absolute beginners to early intermediate Korean learners

retake_policy.notes: No mandatory waiting period between TOPIK attempts. In Korea, TOPIK is held approximately 6 times per year; overseas, approximately 4 times per year. Candidates may register for any available test session.

official_study_resources.title: TOPIK Exam Guide and Level Descriptions
